message:
Fix: remove unused enumerate() calls to satisfy clippy

Clippy's unused_enumerate_index lint (part of -D warnings) caught that
we were calling .enumerate() but only using the underscore-prefixed _idx
which signals the value is intentionally unused.

Since we re-assign indices after filtering anyway (for sequential ordering),
we don't need enumerate() during iteration at all. This simplifies the code
and satisfies the lint.

Changes:
- src/connectors/claude_code.rs: 2 occurrences (JSONL + JSON branches)
- src/connectors/codex.rs: 2 occurrences (JSONL + legacy JSON branches)
- src/connectors/gemini.rs: 1 occurrence (message loop)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
